title: Barista Training Programme neih a ni
content:
894/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 8th July, 2026:Coffee Board of India-a Coffee Quality Division chuan a vawikhatna atan Mizoram-ah Barista Training Programme chu vawiin chawhma dar 10:00 khan ELK Business House, ELK Plaza, Chaltlang, Aizawl-ah an buatsaih.

Ni nga awh tur training programme hi Coffee Board of India leh ELK Business House tangkawp buatsaih a ni a, ELK Business House hi In-City Partner a ni. He programme-ah hian state chhung hmun hrang hrang atangin café hnathawktu te, barista nih tum te, sumdawng te, leh coffee ngainatute an tel a ni. Participants-te hian coffee tui taka siam dan, espresso siam dan, milk texturing, manual brewing methods, coffee tem leh a tui bik hriat dan, café workflow, customer service, leh bungraw enkawl dan chungchangah theoretical leh practical training an nei dawn a ni.

Soil Director Pu Vanlalmuanpuia Chhangte chuan coffee chin pawimawhna a sawi a, participants-te chu coffee sumdawnnaa hun tha inhawng mek hmu thiam turin a fuih a ni.

Keynote address sawitu Soil Joint Secretary Pu Mark Lalthanliana chuan coffee sector hmasawnna leh value addition kawngah training pawimawhzia a sawi a. Mizoram-a coffee hmasawnna atana nodal agency an nih angin department hnuaia hmalakna hrang hrangte a sawi bawk.

He programme hi Pu Lachit Deka, Senior Liaison Officer, Coffee Board of India, Kolasib-in a kaihruai a. Pu Jayanta Ghosh, Deputy Director (Extension), Coffee Board Regional Office, Silchar chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Pi Esther Khiangte, ELK Business House chuan coffee sumdawnnaa a thil tawnte sawiin hun a hmang a. Pu Yatisha Gowda, Master Barista Trainer, Bengaluru chuan kalkhawm te a zirtir a. Pu Lachit Deka, Senior Liaison Officer, Coffee Board of India, Kolasib chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

He programme-ah hian Mizoram-a coffee kaihhnawih skill, entrepreneurship, leh value addition-a pawimawhzia thlur bing niin, Mizoram-a coffee leh café sector thang mek tichak tura a puih beisei a ni.

Attachment

title: SENSITIZATION PROGRAMME ON ONLINE FILLING OF ENUMERATION FORMS HELD FOR GAZETTED OFFICERS UNDER THE GOVERNMENT OF MIZORAM AND LADC
content:
151/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 8 June 2026:As part of the ongoing Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026, a sensitization programme on the online filling of Enumeration Forms was conducted today for Gazetted Officers serving under the Government of Mizoram and the Lai Autonomous District Council (LADC).

The programme for Gazetted Officers under the Government of Mizoram was held at the Deputy Commissioner's Conference Hall, while a separate session for Gazetted Officers under LADC was conducted at the LADC Conference Hall.

During the programme, Shri Collin Hlychho, Election Officer (EO), provided a detailed demonstration on the process of filling up Enumeration Forms through the online mode and highlighted important points to be noted by the officers. The session also included an interactive question-and-answer segment, allowing participants to clarify their queries regarding the online submission process.

Attachment

title: ECI Secretary and Director Review Progress of SIR 2026
content:
150/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 8th June, 2026:The Secretary of the Election Commission of India (ECI), Shri Binod Kumar, and Director Ms. Shubhra Saxena arrived in Mizoram today on a two-day official visit. The ECI officials convened a review meeting with election officials from Aizawl district at the Planning & Programme Implementation Department Conference Hall to assess the progress of the ongoing Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Roll in Mizoram and to deliberate on the measures already undertaken, as well as future strategies for the successful completion of the exercise in the State.

Addressing the attendees, Ms. Shubhra Saxena explained the meaning, objectives, and process of the SIR exercise. She emphasized that SIR is a sensitive and important exercise that requires utmost diligence and care; therefore, she urged the officials to strictly adhere to the provisions of the Constitution of India and the Representation of the People Act, 1950, so as to ensure that all eligible citizens are included in the electoral roll while ineligible persons are excluded from it. Furthermore, Ms. Shubhra highlighted that Mizoram shares a long and porous international border, and urged the officials to exercise greater vigilance against illegal migrants and fraudulent practices, and to take all necessary precautionary measures while carrying out the exercise.

Mizoram's Chief Electoral Officer (CEO) Ms.Garima Gupta also spoke on the occasion and she called upon the officials to work with a strong spirit of cooperation and unity, to be more mobile, and to consistently support the Booth Level Officers (BLOs). She also conveyed her best wishes to all officials for the successful completion of the ongoing SIR exercise in Mizoram.

The meeting was chaired by Ms. Shubhra Saxena. Among those present were Mizoram CEO Ms. Garima Gupta, Aizawl District Election Officer (DEO) and Deputy Commissioner Er. Lalhriatpuia, Electoral Registration Officers (EROs), Assistant Electoral Registration Officers (AEROs), Booth Level Officers (BLOs), and other election officials of the State.

Attachment

title: SIR 2026 KALPUI MEKAH  MIZORAM SAWRKAR LEH LADC HNUAIA  GAZETTED OFFICER - TE TAN 'SENSITIZATION ON FILLING UP OF ENUMERATION FORMS THROUGH ONLINE MODE' NEIH A NI.
content:
893/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 8th June 2026:Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026 kalpui mek zelah vawiin khan Mizoram sawrkar leh Lai Autonomous District Council (LADC) hnuaia Gazetted Officer - te tan Online - a Enumeration Forms - Fill up dan inhrilhhriatna 'Sensitization on Filling up of Enumeration Forms through Online Mode' neih a ni.

Mizoram sawrkar hnuaia Gazetted Officer - te tan  Deputy Commissioner's Conference Hall- ah Training hi neih niin, LADC - hnuaia Gazetted Officer - te tan hian LADC Conference Hall- ah neih a ni bawk a. He hunah hian Pu Collin Hlychho, Election Officer (EO) chuan Online - a Enumeration Forms- fill up dan, hriattur pawimawhte sawifiahna a nei a, zawhna leh chhanna hun hman nghal a ni.

title: MIZORAM CEO PI GARIMA GUPTA IN PRESS MITE KAWM
content:
892/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 8th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Aizawl Press Club-ah Mizoram Chief Electoral Officer Pi Garima Gupta, IAS chuan MIzorama SIR 2026 kalpui dan chungchangah Press mite a kawm.

Electoral Roll Special Intensive Revision (SIR) Chunqchanq

Election Commission of India (ECI) thuchhuak angin, MizoramahSpecial Intensive Revision (SIR)chu20 May 2026atanga khan kalpui mek a ni a.

He hnaah hian Electoral Roll thar Siam a ni ang a. Electoral Roll-a hming awmsa zawng zawng leh voter ni thei zawng zawngte chuanEnumeration Formhmangin registration an dil thar vek tur a ni. SIR-in a turn pawirhawh tak chu voter ni tlakte chu pakhat mah paih loh leh voter ni theilote chu Electoral Roll atanga paih a ni

SIR a Voter inziak lut turte chu heng mite hi an ni tur a ni.

SIR hi India Constitution Article 324 leh Section 21, Representation of the People Act, 1950 leh Registration of Electors Rules, 1960 ten thuneihna an pek angin Election Commission of India chuan a kalpui a ni.

SIR hna thawh hunbi :

Hna

Hun

Preparation, Training & Printing

20-29 May 2026

BLO House-to-House Visit

30 May - 28 June 2026

Polling Station Rationalization

28 June 2026 hma

Draft Electoral Roll Chhuah

5 July 2026

Claims & Objections Thehluh Hun

5 July - 4 August 2026

Hna

Hun

Claims & Objections chinfel hun

5 July -2 September, 2026

Final Electoral Roll tlangzarh

6 September 2026

Enumeration Phase hi kalpui mek a ni a. A tlangpuiin hetiang hian hna thawh mek a ni.

8. Enumeration Phase hi28 June 2026-ahzawh tur a ni.

Mipuite Hnena Ngenna

Mipuite hnena ka ngen duh chu Special Intensive Revision chhung hian a hun takah leh dik takin Enumeration Form te buaipui theuh ila, BLO leh election lama hnathawk dangte chu tha taka Io tawiawm turin ka sawm duh che u a ni. Electoral Roll dik tak kan neih theih nan theihtawp chhuah turin ka sawm vek che u a. Democracy chak zawk leh dik tak, electoral roll felfai kan neih nan kan pawimawh em em a ni tih I hre thar ang u.

Media-te Hnena Ngenna

Media zawng zawngte ka ngen duh che u chu SIR chungchang hriattirna theh darh te, mipuite hnena SIR chungchang zirtirnaaah te a ni.

CEO Mizoram Office atanga thuchhuah pawimawh ; SIR hunbi, kalphung, voter tling thei leh theilote leh ni pawhmawhte hi uluk taka mipuite hnena min puanzar sak thin hi a pawimawh em em a ni.

SIR chungchangah thudik tawklo emaw thu hriatfuh tawk loh avanga buaina awm thei te anih avangin chutiang hun a Io thleng path anih chuan CEO Office lamah thu zawtfiah hmasa zel turin ka ngen takmeuh che u a ni. Thu diklo leh belhchian dawllo te tihdarh palh anih loh nan leh mipuite kan Io fimkhur zawk nan hetiang lam zawhna awm reng reng chu CEO Ofiice chuan Media leh mipuite hnena hrilhfiah zel turin kan inhawng reng bawk a ni.

Thu Pawimawh Dang te

title: Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii’n PBCR buatsaih cancer kaihhnawih zirhona hun a hmanpui
content:
891/2026-2027

Dated, Aizawl 8th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Population Based Cancer Registry Mizoram buatsaihin Workshop cum Re-Orientation on Cancer Registration and Data Quality chu McCabe Hall, Aijal Club ah hman a ni a, Health and Family Welfare Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan khuallian niin hun a hmanpui a, Mizoram Population Based Cancer Registry Report (2018-2022) a tlangzarh nghal.

Minister chuan PBCR Mizoram te hmalakna chu ropui a tih thu a sawi a. PBCR report hian Mizoram pum huap cancer a kan dinhmun chiang taka a pholan thu sawiin, Report-in a hmuhchhuah angin Mizoramah kum tinin cancer case kan neih belh zel a, chutih rualin curative treatment leh palliative care lamah pawh hma kan sawn chho zel chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a ni. JICA (Japan) te nen tangkawp a tuna Mizoramin Cancer Hospital changtlung zawk a neih theihna tura hmalaknaah pawh PBCR statistics hian thui takin kawngro a sut thu sawi a. Health Minister chuan Mizoram PBCR data chu IARC-WHO in a pawm thlap tiin, "Cancer in 5 Continents (C1-5)" an tìhah a zawna vawi 3- Volume IX, X leh XII-ah te lang thei a nihna chuan a rintlak zia a nemnghet a ni, a ti.

Khual zahawm Pi K.Lalrinzuali, Commissioner & Secretary, Health & Family Welfare Department pawhin thu sawiin, Mizorama Doctor thiam tak tak te inpekna leh thawrimna chu ropui a ti a. Doctor te chu an hlutna hre thar tur leh, damlo mangang tak tak te dawhthei taka an enkawl thin avangin an chungah lawmthu a sawi bawk a ni. Hriselna kawnga state in hma a sawnna turin, duh leh mamawh an neih ang te chu thlen thin turin kalkhawmte a chah bawk a ni.

Dr. C. Lalchhandama, Principal Investigator PBCR Mizoram chuan kalkhawmte zingah Trending Cancer Scenarios in Mizoram tih thupui hmangin kum 20 chhunga zirchianna an lo neih tawh atanga an thil hmuhchhuah te a sawi a. PCBR in a tarlan danin Mizoram chu India ram pum puiah cancer a  sang ber kan ni tih a sawi. Kum 2003 – 2020 thlenga zirchiannaah cancer-a san lam kan pan char char thu sawiin, Mizo mipa te ah Pumpui Cancer an tam ber thu leh, hmeichhia ah Chuap Cancer an tam ber thu a sawi a. Mizoram in Cancer kan beihletna atana kan mamawh te, hmalak na tur leh hmalak theih dan hrang hrang te a tarlang nghal bawk a ni.

Mizorama cancer dinhmun dik tak hriatchian a nih theihna tura hmalakna leh PBCR Mizorama sulsutu a nih avangin Dr. Eric Zomawia hnenah PBCR Staff te chuan chawimawina an hlan nghal bawk a ni.

Programme hi hun hnihah then niin, hun khatna hi Dr. Lalchhuankimi, Senior Medical Superintendent, Civil Hospital chuan lawmthu sawi na in a khar a, hun hnihnaah  hian Dr Jeremy L Pautu, Co-Investigator, Mizoram PBCR kaihhruaina hnuaiah mithiam sawm bik te nen PBCR chungchang sawihona hun an hmang bawk a ni.

title: ECI-a Secretary leh Director hovin SIR 2026 chungchangah Review Meeting neih a ni
content:
889/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 8th June, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan Election Commission of India(ECI)-a Secretary Pu Binod Kumar leh Director Pi Shubhra Saxena te chu ni hnih chhung cham turin Mizoram an lo thleng a; Planning & Programme Implementation Department Conference Hall-ah Aizawl district-a election official-te nen Mizoram-a Special Intensive Revision(SIR) of Electoral Roll kalpui mek hlawhtlinna tura an hmalak dan thlirletna leh hmalak zel dan turte sawihona hun an hmang.

Pi Shubhra Saxena chuan kalkhawmte hnenah SIR awmzia leh a kalphung chungchangte a sawifiah a. Pi Shubhra chuan SIR hi hna hautak leh fimkhur taka kalpui ngai a nih avangin, India Constitution-in a sawi ang leh Representation of the People Act, 1950-in a ruat angte chu ngun taka zawm turin kalkhawmte chu a ngen a; hei hi vote nei thei zawng zawng te electoral roll-a telh vek an nih theih nan leh vote nei thei lote chu paihchhuah an nih theih nan a pawimawh thu a sawi a ni. Hemi bakah hian Pi Shubhra chuan Mizoram hi ramri zau tak nei state a nih avangin, dan lo a lo lut (illegal migrants) leh dik lo taka thil tih (fraudulent practices) laka venhimna atan official-te chu fimkhur zawka hma la nasa lehzual turin a fuih bawk a ni.

He hunah Mizoram Chief Electoral Officer(CEO) Pi Garima Gupta pawhin thu sawiin official-te chu thawhhona tha leh inpumkhatna neiin, a tulna apianga che chhuak tur leh BLO-te puih an ngaihna zawna pui zel turin a chah a. Mizoram-a SIR hna kalpui mek chu hlawhtling taka zawh a nih theih nan official-te chu duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm hi Pi Shubhra Saxena in a kaihruai a. Mizoram CEO, Aizawl District DEO Bawrhsap ni bawk Er. Lalhriatpuia, ERO, AERO, BLO te bakah election official dangte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Minister Lalnilawma’n State Level Orientation Programme on VB:G RAM G hmanpui.
content:
888/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 8th June,2026:Vawiin khan State Level Orientation on Viksit Bharat: Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) [VB:G RAM G] chu Conference Hall, Lianchhiari Runah neih a ni a. He hunah hian Prof Lalnilawma, Minister of State for Rural Development and Administration Department chu khuallian a ni.

Rural Development Minister Pu Lalnilawma chuan VB:G RAM G chu mipuiten hlawk taka an chhawr ngei a duh tih a sawi a. He huna tel Official-te leh kalkhawmte chu an hna tha tak leh fel fai taka thawk zel turin a chah a ni.

Inrelbawlna langtlang leh hmasawnna hi sawrkarin a ngai pawimawh tih sawiin, chanchinbumi lo tel te chu RD&A Dept. hmalakna hrang hrangte a hmuna enpui turin a sawm nghal bawk a ni.

Kum-2 chhungin Ministry of Rural Development-in ni-100 daih inhlawhna ‘Labour Budget’ chu an pawm tawh thusawiin, tunkum ah chuan ‘Normative Allocation’ hmanga pawisa hi pek tur a nih avangin Labour Budget approach-in a kal lo thung tih a sawi bawk.

VB:G RAM G thiltum pawimawh tak chu India ram pum huapa hmasawnna ngelnghet neih a ni a ti a. Viksit Bharat@2047 atana mitin te leh Department hrang hrangte inpuahchah nasat a ngaih thu a sawi a ni. Thingtlang khawtin te pawh mahnia intodelh tura theihtawp chhuahin ke pen zel a pawimawh takzet a. He hmalakna kawng atana pawimawh tak chu hnathawh inthlunzawmna (convergence) niin, department hrang hrang atanga hnathawhte chu convergence-nen tha taka kalpui a nih theih ngei a beisei thu a sawi a ni. VB:G RAM G atana State Matching Share pawh Finance Department-ah dil mek a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Minister chuan MGNREGA an lo kalpui thin danah duhthusam a ni em tih te, thingtlang mite MGNREGA Scheme kaltlang hian chhawmdawl tha tawk an ni em tih te ngaihtuah let a ngaih thu a sawi a. Thlenchin atanga hmasawn zel a tul tih a sawi bawk. VB:G RAM G-in a ngaih pawimawh Water Security chungchangah pawh Department hrang hrangten nasa zawka an thawhho a pawimawh thu a sawi a ni.

VB:G RAM G hi kumin July ni-1, 2026 atangin India ram pumah hman tan tur niin, chumi atana inbuatsaihna kal zelah State Level atanga Village Level thleng Orientation leh Public Outreach (Jan Samvaad) neih mek zel a ni. Mizoram-ah pawh inbuatsaihna nasa taka kalpui niin, the Mizoram VB:G RAM G Scheme, 2026 chu Council of Ministers-in a pawm hnuah, chhuah a ni a. India rama VB:G RAM G Scheme kalpui dan tur chhuah hmasaber state a ni. VB:G RAM G hnuaia ni-60 chhung chawlhna (seasonal pause) chungchang pawh Mizoram chuan ruahmanna leh hmalakdan tur a lo duang tawh bawk. Seasonal Pause chhung hian VB:G RAM G-a hna reng reng thawh phal a ni lo a, thingtlang miten buhtuh leh buhseng laia anmahni leh midang hnena an inhlawh theihna tura seasonal pause hi duan a ni.

State Orientation hi Pu V.Lalengmawia, Additional Secretary, Rural Development and Administration Department-in a kaihruai a. MGNREGA leh VB:G RAM G chungchang PowerPoint presentation hmanga zirhona leh sawihona neih a ni bawk.

He hunah hian Sawrkar Dept. aiawhte bakah All Mizoram VC Association hruaitute leh Mizoram Journalists Association-te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Lunglei DC-in Lunglei District aṭanga National Florence Nightingale Award 2026 dawngtu Pi Lalenthangi Hnamte lawmpuina a hlan
content:
887/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 8:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Deputy Commissioner (Bawrhsap) Pi Navneet Mann chuan a hna thawh pindanah India ram puma nurse hna thawk ṭha chawimawina, National Florence Nightingale Award 2026 dawngtu Pi Lalenthangi Hnamte (Health Worker, Ayush Health & Wellness Centre, Tuichawng) hnenah lawmpuina thuziak leh thilpek a hlan.

Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan Pi Lalenthangi Hnamte-in Award a dawn chu District pum hlawhtlinna a nih thu leh District tana hun chhinchhiah tlak leh lawmawm tak a nih thu a sawi a. Pi Lalenthangi Hnamte-in a thawhna hmuna mite tana hriselna kawnga a hna thawh ṭha tak takte chu chhuanawm leh entawn tlak a tih thu sawiin, a inpekna leh ṭhahnem ngaihnaah lawm thu a hrilh a. A Award dawn chu an lawmpui thu sawiin, ṭha taka hna thawh chhunzawm zel a, hlawhtlinna nasa zawk neih belh zel turin duhsakna a hlan a. A hna thawhna chungchanga harsatna leh mamawh a neihte chu thuneitute hnenah inthlahrung lova thlen ṭhin tura chahin, a thawhna Centre tihchangtlunna leh thuam ṭhatna tur pawh theih tawpa an ngaihtuahpui tur thu a sawi.

Lunglei DC Office-in National Florence Nightingale Awardee lawmpuina hun an buatsaihah hian DC Office-a officer-te, SCMO, DIPRO leh Pi Lalenthangi Hnamte chhungte an tel a. Sub-Deputy Commissioner Pi Lalnunchhani Hnamte chuan hun a kaihruai a ni.

Lunglei Senior Chief Medical Officer (SCMO) Dr Lalrinthangi chuan Lunglei District-a hriselna kawnga hma lakna hrang hrangah DC kaihhruaina leh ṭawiawmna avangin hmasawnna tam tak hmuh a nih thu leh an lawm thu sawiin, thawktute tiphur tura DC-in hna thawk ṭhate lawmman leh chawimawina an ruahmansak ṭhin te, Awardee lawmpuina hun an buatsaih te chu lawmawm an tih thu a sawi a. Health Department pawhin Pi Lalenthangi Hnamte hlawhtlinna chu an lawmpui thu leh an chhuan thu sawiin, a hna thawh ṭha tak takte a tar lang a. A thawhna Centre-in an ni tin hna bakah, tlawmngaih chhuah leh inpek ngaihna tam taka an thawh ṭhat thu te, hotute'n tih tur leh zawm tur an tih an kalpui ṭhat thu leh document hrang hrang ṭha taka an vawn ṭhin thu te tar langin, centre leh thawktu dang tan pawh entawn tlak tak an nih thu a sawi.

National Florence Nightingale Award 2026 dawngtu Pi Lalenthangi Hnamte chuan Award dawng tura dilna chungchanga buaipuitu Health Department official-te leh ṭhenrual ṭhate chungah lawm thu sawiin, Award dawng tura a kalna leh a dawn hnua ngaihsakna leh duhsakna a dawn avang te, Health Department hotute leh a thawhpuite, District thuneitute, pawl leh mimal lawmpuitu leh thilpek petute chungah te lawm thu a sawi a. Award dawng tura tehfung hrang hrangah hlawhtlinna an neih vek thu sawiin, damdawi ina nau nei zat tipung tura an thawh rimna leh hlawhtlinna te, hri danna pek kawnga an hlawhtlinna leh damlo thi mai tur nunna chhan him an neih ṭhenkhatte chu Award a dawn chhan langsar zual nia a hriat thu a sawi.

Pi Lalenthangi Hnamte hian International Nurses Day, May ni 12, 2026 khan National Florence Nightingale Award hi Rashtrapati Bhavan, New Delhi-ah India President Pi Droupadi Murmu kut aṭangin a dawng a. Mizoram aṭanga he chawimawina dawng thei 18-na a ni.

Pi Lalenthangi Hnamte hi Auxiliary Nurse Midwife (ANM) niin, kum 1999-ah health worker hna a thawk ṭan a. Siaha, Lawngtlai leh Lunglei District-a health sub-centre hrang hrangah thawk tawhin, kum 2017 aṭang khan Tuichawng AHWC-ah a thawk a. Tuichawng AHWC hnuaiah hian khaw 5 (Tuichawng 1, 2 & 3 leh Belpei 1 & 2) awmin, mihring 4,652 an awm.

Tuichawng AHWC-a Pi Lalenthangi Hnamte a thawh hnu hian damdawi ina nau nei (institutional delivery) chu 10% aṭangin 87%-ah kai chho tawhin, kum 2025–2026 chhung khan damdawi ina nau nei 78 lai an awm a. Hri danna pek kawngah pawh a ti ṭha ber pawl ni ṭhinin, damlo na zual leh thi mai tur nunna chhan eng emaw zat an nei tawh bawk a. Sikserh (malaria) dona leh venna kawngah pawh hlawhtlinna chhuanawm tak neiin, Tuichawng AHWC huam chhunga kum 2024-a malaria case 703 awm chu kum 2025-ah 158-ah a tla thla a, a tlak hniamna hi 78% a ni.

Attachment

title: Rajya Sabha MP inthlan chuh turten thu an tiam
content:
886/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 8th June,2026:June ni 18, 2026-a Rajya Sabha MP inthlan lo awm tur atana Mizoram atanga seat khat awm chuh tum candidate ten vawiin khan Returning Officer Pu Zothansanga Ralte, Commissioner & Secretary, Mizoram Legislative Assembly hnenah India ram dânpui (Constitution) rinawm leh thuawih taka zawm tur leh, constitution in India ram thuneihna a pek leh inpumkhatna vawnghim turin thu an tiam a ni.

Vawiin chawhnu dar 3:00 a nomination file hun khar a nih veleh khan Rajya Sabha MP election candidate pahnihte hi Returning Officer Pu Zothansanga Ralte, Commissioner & Secretary, Mizoram Legislative Assembly pisa ah anmahni tawiawmtute nen an kal nghal a, Mizo National Front (MNF) official candidate Pi Zothansangi Hmar chuan thutiam a la hmasa a, hemi zawh veleh hian Zoram People’s Movement (ZPM) official candidate Pu K. Laltluangkiama’n thutiam hi a la chhunzawm ve nghal a ni.

Election Commission of India thuchhuah danin nomination file te hi naktuk June ni 9, 2026 ah endik a ni ang a, June ni 11, 2026 thleng inhnuhdawhna hun hawn a ni ang.

June ni 18, 2026 (Ningani) zing dar 9 atanga tlai dar 4 thleng vote thlakna hun hawn a ni ang a, hemi ni vek tlai dar 5 ah vote chhiar nghal a ni ang.

June ni 18, 2026 hian Mizoram bakah Manipur, Meghalaya leh Arunachal Pradesh ah te seat 1 theuh, Andhra Pradesh, Gujarat leh Karnataka seat 4 theuh leh Rajasthan leh Madhya Pradesh-ah seat 3 ve ve leh Jharkhand a seat 2 hnawhkhat turin Rajya Sabha MP thlanna hi neih tur a ni.

title: CHIEF MINISTER ATTENDS CELEBRATION OF 90 YEARS OF ALL INDIA RADIO AND 60 YEARS OF ALL INDIA RADIO AIZAWL STATION
content:
149/2026-2027

"All India Radio Aizawl is not merely a broadcaster of news; it has been a trusted friend and companion of the Mizo people. While disseminating information in the Mizo language, it has also played a vital role in preserving and promoting the language. Owing to its extensive reach, it has significantly contributed to fostering unity among Zo people."

— Lalduhoma, Chief Minister

Aizawl, 8 June 2026:Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma today attended the celebration marking the 90th anniversary of All India Radio (AIR) and the 60th anniversary of All India Radio Aizawl Station.

The Chief Minister inaugurated the Jubilee Commemorative Stone at AIR Aizawl Station and participated in a brief interview session at the Drama Studio, during which he also selected a song. He later attended the main commemorative function held at Vanapa Hall as the Chief Guest.

In his speech, the Chief Minister stated that the completion of 90 years of All India Radio is a milestone of great significance for the nation. For a long period, Akashvani was the only mass communication medium available in the country. From the time India attained Independence until today, it has served as an invaluable platform for both the government and the people.

AIR Aizawl Station was established on 31 July 1966 with a 150-watt transmitter. Although broadcasts were initially limited to evening programmes, the station quickly became an integral part of people's lives and earned their trust and affection.

Reflecting on the difficult years of unrest in Mizoram, he noted that curfews were frequent and often prolonged. During those challenging times, AIR Aizawl became a vital source of comfort, information, and connection for the people. For many who were unable to gather in churches, listening to hymns and devotional programmes through the radio provided spiritual strength and encouragement.

“Therefore, All India Radio Aizawl is not merely a broadcaster of news; it has been a trusted friend and companion of the Mizo people,” he said.

The Chief Minister further stated that AIR Aizawl has served as an exemplary institution in promoting the proper use of the Mizo language. Through its careful editorial standards and responsible broadcasting, it has earned the trust of the public while simultaneously preserving and strengthening the language.

He also highlighted the station's contribution to strengthening bonds among Zo communities beyond India's borders. Owing to the wide reach of its broadcasts, listeners in neighbouring Myanmar and Bangladesh have long been able to tune in, thereby fostering a greater sense of unity among Zo people and encouraging the wider use of their common language.

The Chief Minister congratulated AIR Aizawl News Editors Pu H.C. Vanlalruata and Pu Issac Zoramsanga, who received the 46th Annual News & Documentary Emmy Award in 2025. He noted that they are believed to be the first Mizos to receive such a prestigious honour and said that their achievement has opened a new chapter in the history of journalism in Mizoram while bringing recognition to the Mizo people on the global stage. Their success, he added, reflects the high standards and quality of AIR Aizawl.

Addressing journalists and media professionals, the Chief Minister encouraged them to intensify efforts to project Mizoram's stories, achievements, and perspectives to the wider world. He observed that with the inclusion of the Mizo language in Google's translation systems, Artificial Intelligence now enables easier translation of Mizo into other languages, creating new opportunities for wider dissemination of information.

He also noted that the rapid growth of social media platforms has created an environment in which people receive far more information than ever before. While this has many positive aspects, it also presents challenges, including the spread of misinformation and unverified content. In such circumstances, he said, AIR Aizawl, other media houses, and particularly government-accredited journalists must continue to serve as reliable sources of accurate and trustworthy information.

The Chief Minister remarked that he is among those who have personally witnessed the immense value and contribution of AIR Aizawl over the past six decades. He expressed gratitude, on behalf of the people of Mizoram, to all those who have served the station since its inception and commended those who continue to carry forward its legacy with dedication.

At the function held at Vanapa Hall, Dr. Lalropuia, Director and Cluster Head, delivered the welcome address. The programme also featured a screening of an All India Radio documentary, performances by veteran and emerging artistes, and a costume parade. The event concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Pu Biakchungnunga, Head of Programme.

Background: A Brief History of All India Radio

The origins of radio broadcasting in India date back to 1923, when the Radio Club of Bombay launched the country's first radio service. Similar initiatives subsequently emerged in Madras and Calcutta. In 1927, the Indian Broadcasting Company (IBC) was established, operating stations in Bombay and Calcutta. However, the company ceased operations in 1930.

On 1 April 1930, the British Government assumed responsibility for broadcasting and established the Indian State Broadcasting Service. On 8 June 1936, it was renamed All India Radio (AIR).

During India's freedom movement, particularly around 1942, underground Congress Radio broadcasts played an influential role in mobilising public sentiment in support of independence.

In 1957, AIR officially adopted the name Akashvani, meaning "Voice from the Sky." Today, it is one of the largest radio networks in the world and among the most extensive multilingual broadcasting services. It broadcasts in 23 languages and over 146 dialects, covering approximately 92 per cent of India's geographical area and reaching nearly 98 per cent of its population.

According to the Digital News Report 2024 published by the Reuters Institute for the Study of Journalism at Oxford University, Akashvani News was ranked among the most trusted news sources in India.

The same year that AIR adopted the name Akashvani, Mizo-language programming was launched from Gauhati on 1 April 1957. Subsequently, on 31 July 1966, All India Radio Aizawl Station was established with a 150-watt transmitter, marking the beginning of dedicated radio broadcasting services in Mizoram.

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN ALL INDIA RADIO-IN KUM 90 A TLIN LEH ALL INDIA RADIO AIZAWL STATION-IN KUM 60 A TLIN LAWMNA TELPUI
content:
885/2026-2027

"All India Radio Aizawl hi thuthar thehdarhtu a ni ringawt lo va, Mizo mipuite thian tha, min awm tleitu a ni thin. Mizo tawng a thehdarh rualin a humhalh nghal a. A a thlen chin a zau avangin Zofate inpumkhatna kawngah pawh a thawh hlawk hle". – Lalduhoma, Chief Minister.

Aizawl the 8th June 2026:Vawiin khan All India Radio Aizawl Station chuan All India Radio-in kum 90 a tlinna leh All India Radio Aizawl Station-in kum 60 a tlin lawmna an buatsaih chu Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan a telpui. All India Radio Aizawl Station-ah Jubilee lungphun a hawng a, Drama Studio-ah Interview tawi a nei a, hla a thlang a, chumi zawhah a lawmna pui ber Vanapa Hall-a neihah khuallian niin a tel a. Pu B. Lalchhanzova, Minister, IPR & PS, Pi Baryl Vanneihsangi, MLA (Ex Radio Jockey), Pi Betsy Zothanpari Sailo, Secretary, IPR & PS, Pi K. Vanlalsangi, MIS, Director, I&PR leh I&PR officers ten an tawiawm.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, All India Radio-in kum 90 a tling ta hi India ram tana hun chhinchhiahtlak a tling a. Akashvani hi hun rei tak chhung chu kan ramin Mass Communication hmarua kan neih chhun a ni thin a. India Independence kan sual lai ata vawiin thlengin sorkar leh mipuiten kan chhawr tangkai em em a ni.

Kum 1966-ah Mizoram a lo buai a, July ni 31 khan, 150 Watt Transmitter hmang Aizawl Radio Station a lo ding a. Zan lamah chauh programme an tichhuak nain mipuiten kan hlut hle. Curfew a zingin a rei thin bawk si a. Curfew an han puan lah khan, a hma zawng zawnga inkhawm ngai lo pawh khan inkhawm kan han chak thar a, nula rima chhuak ngai lote pawhin nula rim kha kan chak ta ut ut mai thin a. Chutianga, boruak tawt tak hnuaia kan awm lai zawng zawnga kan inhnangfakna ber chu All India Radio, Aizawl kha a ni. Biak ina inkhawm thei lo mipuiten Pathian fakna hla Radio kaltlanga an han ngaithla thin te kha, a hlutzia sawifiah thiam phak a ni lo.

Chuvang chuan, All India Radio Aizawl hi thuthar thehdarhtu a ni ringawt lo va, Mizo mipuite thian tha, min awm tleitu a ni thin.

Mizo ṭawng hman dik chungchangah pawh All India Radio Aizawl hi a entawn tlak hle a. Thuziak leh puanchhuah kawnga an fimkhur avangin rin pawh a hlawh a. Mizo tawng a thehdarh rualin a humhalh tel bawk a, a hnathawh hi a hlu hle.

Tin, Radio hi a thlen chin a zau avangin kan thenawm ram Myanmar leh Bangladesh atangte pawhin an lo ngaithla ve zel a. Chu chuan Zofate inpumkhatna kawngah nasa takin min pui. Lusei tawng, kan Common language-a kan hman chhoh takna kawngah pawh hian a thawhhlawk hlein ka hria.

All India Radio Aizawl-a thawk News Editor pahnih Pu HC Vanlalruata leh Pu Issac Zoramsangate chu nikum khan 46th Annual News & Documentary Emmy Award, 2025 hlan an ni a. Mizo zinga hetiang Award dawng thei awm chhun hi an la niin ka hria. Anni pahnih hian Mizoram Journalism History-ah bung thar min kaipui a, khawvelah Mizote min tihmingtha a, an hlawhtlinna hian AIR Aizawl hi a quality a tha tawk tih min hrilh a ni.

Vawiina lo kal khawm, kan Journalist-te hian kan ram chanchin ram pawna thehdarh hi lo uar deuh deuh rawh u. Google-in Mizo tawng a lakluh atang khan Artificial Intelligence hmangin Mizo tawng hi awlsam takin tawng dangin a lehlin theih tawh a. He remchanna hi thiam takin i hmang ang u.

Social Media Platform chi hrang hrang a lo chhuak ta uaih uaih mai a. Information hi kan mamawh aia tam, kan ei sen loh kan dawng ta a. Hei hian kan nunah a tha zawnga nghawng tam tak nei mah se, a chhe zawnga min hruaina pawh sawi tur a tam hle. Hetiang boruak kara kan chen tak avang hian All India Radio Aizawl leh kan Media House te, a bik takin sorkar Accreditation nei chinte hi chu mipuite tana rin ngam, thudik puangtu, palai rinawm ni tura ngaih in ni.

Kum 60 chhunga Aizawl Radio Station-in mipuite tana hna a thawh nasatzia leh a hlutzia hretute zinga mi ka ni a. Mizo mipuite hian AIR Aizawl chungah hian lawmthu sawi tur kan niin ka hria. A tir atanga he station lo enkawl tawhtute zawng zawng chungah lawmthu ka sawi a. Vawiin thlenga nung taka kalpui zeltute kan chhuang che u a ni, a ti.

Vanapa Hall-a inkhawmah hian Pu DR. Lalropuia, Director & Cluster Head chuan kal khawmte lawmna thu a sawi a, All India Radio Documentary thlirhona neih a ni a, hranghlui zaithiam leh thangthar zaithiamten hun an hmang a, Costume Parade entir a ni bawk. Pu Biakchungnunga, Head of Programme chuan lawmthu sawiin a lawmna inkhawm hi a khar a ni.

All India Radio chanchin tlangpui:

Kum 1923 ah khan Radio Club of Bombay ten India rama a hmasa ber atan Radio Service an kalpui tan a. He mi kum vek hian Madras leh Calcutta-ah pawh kalpui an awm bawk a. Kum 1927 ah Indian Broadcasting Company (IBC) a lo piang ta a ni. Bombay leh Calcutta-ah bawk bul an tan a. Kum thum hnuah, 1930 ah an tla chhe leh rih a.

British sorkar khan April ni 1, 1930 ah Indian State Broadcasting Service tiin hma thar an la a. Kum 1936 June ni 8-ah All India Radio tiin a hming an thlak a.

Kum 1942 velah khan Independence Movement kalpuitu lamin Underground Congress Radio an rawn kalpui ta a. Mipuite thinlungah hna a thawk nasa hle a. Zalenna sual turin a suihkhawm a, independence movement hmanraw tangkai ber zinga mi a ni.

Kum 1957 khan a official hming atan Akashvani (Voice from the sky) tia thlak a ni a. Vawiinah chuan khawvela Radio Network lian ber, ṭawng hrang hranga thupuang darh tam ber a lo ni ta a ni. Tawng chi 23 leh chibil tawng (dialect) 146 chuanga ngaihthlak theih a ni a, India ram Geographical area za zela 92% a tuam chhuak tawh a, ram mipui 98% hnen a thleng mek a ni.

Kum 2024 a Oxford University-a Reuters Institute for the Study of Journalism-in Digital News Report 2024 a tihchhuahah Akashvani News hi India rama News puanchhuahna rintlak ber a nih thu a puang nghe nghe.

Kum 1957, Akashvani tia a hming an thlak kum, April ni 1-ah khan Gauhati atangin Mizo Programme tihchhuah tan a ni a. Kum 1966 July ni 31 khan, 150 Watt Transmitter hmang Aizawl Radio Station chu a ding ve ta a ni.

title: SAITUALAH DCC/DLRC /DLSC ON DECEMBER 2025 & MARCH 2026 QUARTER ENDING THUKHAWM
content:
884/2026-2027

Saitual, the 8th June, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah, Saitual District Consultative Committee (DCC), District Level Review Committee (DLRC) leh District Level Security Committee (DLSC) on December 2025 & March 2026 quarter ending chu an chairperson, District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi, kaihhruaiin an ṭhukhawm a, Potential Linked Credit Plan tlangzarh nghal a ni bawk.

District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a, bank leh line department te chu tanrual a tul tih sawiin, Financial Literacy Campaign-ah te pawh a theih ang anga inpuitawn turin a chah. Bawrhsap chuan mipuiten hamthatna an dawn theih nan bank leh line department te chu theih tawp chhuah turin a sawm a, a theih ang anga puih a inhuam thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin ṭhutkhawmah hian Credit Deposit Ratio (CD Ratio) dinhmun te, Annual Credit Plan (Priority & Non Priority Sector, SHG - Bank linkage) chungchang te, RSETI Saitual District-a din tur te, Govt Sponsored Schemes chi hrang hrang,i.e NRLM, NULM, PMEGP, SUI etc. te, PMMY (Mudra) loan te, Financial Literacy Campaign leh Social Security Schemes (PMJJBY & PMSBY) bakah bank hrang hrangten Non-Performing Assets( NPA) an neih dante thlir ho a ni

Vawiin thutkhawmah hi District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan a kai hruai a, Pu Lalnghawrliana, Lead District Manager & member secretary, Pi Lalhmachhuani, DDM, NABARD bakah line department hrang hrang aiawh te, Saitual District chhunga bank hrang hrang hotute bakah NGO aiawhte an tel a ni.

title: Rajya Sabha MP inthlan chuh turin MNF official candidate-in hming pe
content:
883/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 8th June, 2026:Mizoram Rajya Sabha inthlan June ni 18, 2026-a vote thlak turah vawiin khan Mizo National Front (MNF) official candidate Pi Zothansangi Hmar chuan Returning Officer Pu Zothansanga Ralte, Commissioner & Secretary, Mizoram Legislative Assembly hnenah nomination a file.

Election Commission of India thuchhuah danin inthlan chuh tumte tan vawiin chawhnu dar 3:00 thlengin nomination a file theih a, nomination file te hi June ni 9, 2026 ah endik niin, June ni 11, 2026 thleng inhnuhdawhna hun hawn a ni ang.

June ni 18, 2026 (Ningani) zing dar 9 atanga tlai dar 4 thleng vote thlakna hun hawn a ni ang a, hemi ni vek tlai dar 5 ah vote chhiar nghal a ni ang.

June ni 18, 2026 hian Mizoram bakah Manipur, Meghalaya leh Arunachal Pradesh ah te seat 1 theuh, Andhra Pradesh, Gujarat leh Karnataka seat 4 theuh leh Rajasthan leh Madhya Pradesh-ah seat 3 ve ve leh Jharkhand a seat 2 hnawhkhat turin Rajya Sabha MP thlanna hi neih tur a ni.

title: Minister Pi Lalrinpuii’n Mizoram Secretariat-ah PALNA Anganwadi-cum-Crèche a hawng
content:
882/2026-2027

Aizawl, Dated 8th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram Secretariat, MINECO-ah “PALNA Anganwadi-cum-Crèche” chu Social Welfare & Women and Child Development Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan khuallianin hawnna hun a hmang.

Khuallian Pi Lalrinpuii chuan thu sawiin, Secretariat-a hnathawktu nu leh pa, a bik takin hmeichhe hnathawkten rilru ngaihngam tak leh hna leh chhungkaw enkawl kawp dan tha zawk nei chunga sawrkar hna an thawh theih nan he hmun hi siam a ni, a ti a. Minister chuan kum 6 hnuailam naupangte chu an taksa leh rilru nasa taka a than lai a nih avangin uluk taka enkawl an ngai a ni tiin, he crèche kaltlang hian naupangte hriselna, ei leh in, leh an hmasawnna kawng hrang hrang chhinchhiah zui zel a nih tur thu a sawi bawk. He hmun hian nu hnathawktute phurrit a chhawk ngei a rin thu a sawi a, crèche-a thawktu zawng zawngte chu theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a ni.

Minister chuan he hmalakna hlawhtlin nana thawktute chungah lawmthu sawiin, he crèche hi Mizoram chhunga Department dangte tan pawh entawn tlak a nih a beisei thu a sawi a. Ram hmasawnna tak tak thleng tur chuan naupang leh hmeichhiate dinhmun chawi kan leh ngaihsak thiam a pawimawh hle a ni, a ti bawk.

SWW&CD Department Commissioner & Secretary Pi Lalzarmawii chuan programme kaihruaiin khuhhawnna thu a sawi a. Mizoram pisa lian ber Secretariat-ah nu leh pa hnathawktute puitu tur nau enkawlna hmun pawimawh tak hawn a ni chu ni chhinchhiahtlak tak a nih thu a sawi.

WCD Director Pi Zoramthangi Chhangte chuan thu sawiin, PALNA Anganwadi-cum-Crèche chungchang thu sawiin, he scheme hi kum 2022 aṭanga Ministry of Women & Child Development (MoWCD) chuan Mission Shakti (Women Empowerment) hnuaia hnathawktu hmeichhiate tana a rawn duan thar a nih thu a tarlang a. The Maternity Benefit Act, 2017 angin hnathawktu mi 50 aia tam awmna hmunah crèche facility neih ngei tur a nih angin, MoWCD operational guidelines zulzuiin he hmun hi kalpui a ni dawn a ni, a ti. He hmun hi naupang kum 6 hnuailam enkawlna tura duan a ni a, Anganwadi hnai ber nena thlunzawm a nih angin naupangten nutrition, health check-up, leh chaw tha an dawn vek tur thu a sawi bawk.

Director chuan he Secretariat PALNA Crèche hi uluk taka duan a nih thu sawiin, enkawltu hran Management Committee siam a ni a, kalphung mumal tak nei nghal turin circular chhuah tawh a nih thu a sawi a ni.

He hunah hian SWW&CD Department, Directorate of WCD leh crèche thawktu ṭhahnem tak an tel thei a. SWW&CD Department Joint Secretary Pi Zonunthari chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP OFFICE CHUAN PADMA AWARD 2026  CHUNGCHANGAH MIPUITE HRIATTIRNA A TICHHUAK
content:
881/2026-2027

Lawngtlai 8th June 2026:Padma Award chungchangah a hnuaia mi ang hian Bawrhsap Office chuan mipuite hriattirna a tichhuak.

India ram pum huap chawimawina sang Padma Award chi thum; Padma Vibhushan, Padma Bhushan leh Padma Shri-te chu heng field; Art, Literature & Education, Sports, Medicine, Social Work, Science and Engineering, Public Affairs, Civil Service, Trade & Industry leh a dangte lama thawh hlawk leh hmingthate tan dilna hun hawn a ni leh ta a.

He award dil turte chuan an hmalakna leh hlawhtlinna report kimchang tak ziakin SDO (S) Office, Lawngtlaiah emaw Ministry of Home Affairs website; Rashtriya Puraskar portal awards.gov.in ah in register-in thehluh tur a ni.

He award atana nomination hiJune ni 25, 2026 ral hma ngeiin SDO (S) ah thehluh theih a ni a, Portal tarlan kaltlangin July ni 31, 2026 thleng thehluh theih a ni bawk e.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP OFFICE CHUAN JEEVAN RAKSHA PADAK SERIES OF  AWARD 2026 CHUNGCHANGAH MIPUITE HRIATTIRNA A TICHHUAK
content:
880/2026-2027

Lawngtlai 8th June 2026:Jeevan Raksha Padak Series of Award 2026 chungchangah a hnuaia mi ang hian Bawrhsap Office chuan mipuite hriattirna a tichhuak.

India sawrkarin Mi dang nun humhimna atana mahni nunna chân hlauhawm tak karah pawha huaisenna lantirtute hnenah chawimawina sang a hlan thin Jeevan Raksha Padak Award chi thum; Sarvottam Jeevan Raksha Padak, Uttam Jeevan Raksha Padak leh Jeevan Raksha Padak chu kum 2026 atan hlan a ni leh dawn a.

He Award - hi India Sawrkarin midang nun humhimna atana huaisen taka thiltite lawmman a pekna a ni a. Tui tla, kang mei, accident, Electric - man, ramsa hlauhawm leh khuarel chhiatna lak atanga midangte chhhanchhuak tura huaisen taka thawk chhuakte hnenah pek thin a ni.

October ni 1, 2026 ral hma a midangte nun humhimna atana huaisen taka an hnathawhte chiang taka ziakin he Award - hi dil theih a ni a. Dilna hi SDO (S) Office, Lawngtlaiah emaw Ministry of Home Affairs website; Rashtriya Puraskar portal awards.gov.in ah in register-in thehluh tur a ni.

He award atana nomination hi July ni 31, 2026 ral hma ngeiin SDO (S) Office - ah emaw Portal kaltlanga thehluh theih a ni bawk e.
